# hetzner_firewall_templates (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all firewall templates.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_firewall_templates" "all" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `templates` (Attributes List) List of firewall templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--templates))

<a id="nestedatt--templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `templates`

Read-Only:

- `allowlist_hos` (Boolean) Allow Hetzner services.
- `filter_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether template filters IPv6 traffic.
- `id` (String) Template ID.
- `input` (Attributes List) Incoming traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--templates--input))
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default template.
- `name` (String) Template name.
- `output` (Attributes List) Outgoing traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--templates--output))

<a id="nestedatt--templates--input"></a>
### Nested Schema for `templates.input`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Action: accept or discard.
- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.


<a id="nestedatt--templates--output"></a>
### Nested Schema for `templates.output`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) Action: accept or discard.
- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.
